description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:alpine Docker image and runs a before_script step installing make with apk add --update make. Cache the file CHANGES.html across jobs. Define two stages, exec and deploy. In the exec stage add a run job that executes make run and is limited to runs where the $GITLAB_TOKEN variable is defined. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs make public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
